metadata.title: Folder notes
metadata.description: Create notes within folders that can be accessed without collapsing the folder, similar to the functionality offered in Notion.

regex.source: Notice("Folder overview: Couldn't find the folder")
regex.target: Notice("文件夹概览：无法找到文件夹")
Notice("已完成更新文件夹笔记")

regex.source: Notice('File name cannot contain any of the following characters: * " \\ / < > : | ?')
regex.target: Notice('文件名不能包含以下字符：* " \\ / < > : | ?')

regex.source: Notice("File name cannot end with a dot")
Notice("Successfully removed folder from excluded folders")
regex.target: Notice("成功从排除的文件夹中移除文件夹")

regex.source: Notice("Successfully excluded folder from folder notes")
regex.target: Notice("成功从文件夹笔记中排除文件夹")

regex.source: Notice("Folder with same name already exists!")
Notice("A folder with the same name already exists")
Notice("Error creating folder overview (folder notes plugin)")
regex.target: Notice("创建文件夹概览时出错（文件夹笔记插件）")

regex.source: name: "Make current active note a folder note for the folder of the active note"
regex.target: name: "将当前活动笔记作为活动笔记所在文件夹的文件夹笔记"

regex.source: name: "Create folder note with a new folder for the active note in the current folder"
regex.target: name: "在当前文件夹中为活动笔记创建新的文件夹笔记"

regex.source: name: "Create markdown folder note for current folder of active note"
regex.target: name: "为活动笔记的当前文件夹创建Markdown文件夹笔记"

regex.source: name: `Create ${fileType} folder note for current folder of active note`
regex.target: name: `为活动笔记的当前文件夹创建 ${fileType} 文件夹笔记`

regex.source: name: "Delete folder note of current folder of active note"
regex.target: name: "删除活动笔记当前文件夹的文件夹笔记"

regex.source: name: "Open folder note of current folder of active note"
regex.target: name: "打开活动笔记当前文件夹的文件夹笔记"

regex.source: name: "Create folder note from selected text"
regex.target: name: "从选定文本创建文件夹笔记"

regex.source: text: "A folder note for this folder already exists"
regex.target: text: "此文件夹的文件夹笔记已存在"

regex.source: text: "Are you sure you want to turn the note into a folder note and rename the existing folder note?"
regex.target: text: "您确定要将笔记转换为文件夹笔记并重命名现有文件夹笔记吗？"

regex.source: text: `Are you sure you want to delete the folder note "${this.file.name}" ?`
regex.target: text: `您确定要删除文件夹笔记 "${this.file.name}" 吗？`

regex.source: text: "It will be moved to your system trash."
regex.target: text: "它将被移动到您的系统回收站。"

regex.source: text: 'It will be moved to your Obsidian trash, which is located in the ".trash" hidden folder in your vault.'
regex.target: text: '它将被移动到您的 Obsidian 回收站，该回收站位于您保险库中的 ".trash" 隐藏文件夹中。'

regex.source: text: "Create folder note for every folder"
regex.target: text: "为每个文件夹创建文件夹笔记"

regex.source: text: "Make sure to backup your vault before using this feature."
regex.target: text: "使用此功能之前，请确保备份您的保险库。"

regex.source: text: "This feature will create a folder note for every folder in your vault."
regex.target: text: "此功能将为您保险库中的每个文件夹创建文件夹笔记。"

regex.source: text: "Every folder that already has a folder note will be ignored."
regex.target: text: "每个已存在文件夹笔记的文件夹将被忽略。"

regex.source: text: "Every excluded folder will be ignored."
regex.target: text: "每个排除的文件夹将被忽略。"
.setName("在文件夹概览中不显示文件夹")

regex.source: .setName("Disable auto creation of folder notes in this folder")
regex.target: .setName("禁用在此文件夹中自动创建文件夹笔记")
.setName("打开文件夹笔记时折叠文件夹")

regex.source: .setName('Enter the name of the extension (only the short form, e.g. "md")')
.setName("Use folder name instead of folder note name in the tab title")
regex.target: .setName("在标签标题中使用文件夹名称而不是文件夹笔记名称")

regex.source: .setName("Default folder note type for new folder notes")
regex.target: .setName("新文件夹笔记的默认文件夹笔记类型")
.setName("文件夹笔记支持的文件类型")

regex.source: .setName("Delete folder notes when deleting the folder")
regex.target: .setName("删除文件夹时删除文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setName("Move folder notes when moving the folder")
regex.target: .setName("移动文件夹时移动文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setName("Open folder note in a new tab by default")
regex.target: .setName("默认在新标签页中打开文件夹笔记")
.setName("启用前置内容标题插件集成")
.setName("为每个文件夹创建文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setName("Don't open folder notes by clicking on the name (on mobile)")
regex.target: .setName("在手机上点击名称时不打开文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setName("Only open folder notes through the name")
regex.target: .setName("仅通过名称打开文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setName("Change folder name in the file explorer")
regex.target: .setName("在文件资源管理器中更改文件夹名称")

regex.source: .setName("Hide collapse icon also when the attachment folder is in the same folder")
regex.target: .setName("当附件文件夹在同一文件夹中时也隐藏折叠图标")
.setName("为文件夹笔记的名称添加下划线")
.setName("为路径中的文件夹添加下划线")
.setName("将路径中的文件夹名称加粗")

regex.source: .setName("Cursive the name of folder notes in the path")
regex.target: .setName("在路径中将文件夹笔记的名称斜体")

regex.source: .setName("Show folder names of folders that appear empty in the folder overview")
regex.target: .setName("显示在文件夹概览中似乎为空的文件夹的名称")

regex.source: .setName("Only show first empty subfolders of current folder")
regex.target: .setName("仅显示当前文件夹的第一个空子文件夹")
.setName("禁用文件夹笔记的折叠图标")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if the subfolders of the folder should also be excluded")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择是否也排除文件夹的子文件夹")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if the folder note should be renamed when the folder name is changed")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择是否在文件夹名称更改时重命名文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if the folder should be shown in the folder overview")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择是否在文件夹概览中显示该文件夹")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if a folder note should be created when a new folder is created")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择在创建新文件夹时是否创建文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if the folder note should be opened when the folder is opened")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择在打开文件夹时是否打开文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if the folder should be collapsed when the folder note is opened")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择在打开文件夹笔记时是否折叠文件夹")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if the folder name should be renamed when the file name has been changed")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择在文件名更改时是否重命名文件夹名称")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if a folder note should be created when a new folder is created that matches this pattern")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择在创建新文件夹时，如果符合此模式，是否创建文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose the file extension for the folder notes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择文件夹笔记的文件扩展名。")

regex.source: .setDesc("{{folder_name}} will be replaced with the name of the folder")
regex.target: .setDesc("{{folder_name}} 将替换为文件夹的名称")

regex.source: .setDesc(`When you're using a folder note name like "folder note" and have multiple folder notes open you can't separate them anymore by their name. This setting uses the folder name instead and allows you to indentify the different files.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`当您使用诸如 "文件夹笔记" 的文件夹笔记名称且打开多个文件夹笔记时，无法通过名称区分它们。此设置使用文件夹名称来代替，并允许您识别不同的文件。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose the default file type for new folder notes. (canvas, markdown, ...)")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择新文件夹笔记的默认文件类型。（画布、Markdown 等）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose where to store the folder notes")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择存储文件夹笔记的位置")

regex.source: .setDesc("Move all folder notes to the new storage location")
regex.target: .setDesc("将所有文件夹笔记移动到新的存储位置")

regex.source: .setDesc("Delete the folder note when deleting the folder")
regex.target: .setDesc("删除文件夹时删除文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Move the folder note when moving the folder")
regex.target: .setDesc("移动文件夹时移动文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("The key combination to create a folder note")
regex.target: .setDesc("创建文件夹笔记的快捷键组合")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select the combination to open a folder note")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择打开文件夹笔记的组合键")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically rename the folder note when the folder name is changed")
regex.target: .setDesc("当文件夹名称更改时自动重命名文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Ask for confirmation before deleting a folder note")
regex.target: .setDesc("删除文件夹笔记前询问确认")

regex.source: .setDesc("What happens to the folder note after you delete it")
regex.target: .setDesc("删除后文件夹笔记会发生什么")

regex.source: .setDesc("Always open folder notes in a new tab (except when you try to open the same note) instead of having to use ctrl/cmd + click to open in a new tab")
regex.target: .setDesc("始终在新标签页中打开文件夹笔记（除非您尝试打开同一笔记），而不必使用 ctrl/cmd + 点击在新标签页中打开")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically create a folder note when a new folder is created")
regex.target: .setDesc("创建新文件夹时自动创建文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically rename a folder name when the folder note is renamed")
regex.target: .setDesc("当文件夹笔记重命名时自动重命名文件夹名称")

regex.source: .setDesc("Create a folder note for every folder in the vault")
regex.target: .setDesc("为保管库中的每个文件夹创建文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Hide the folder note in the file explorer")
regex.target: .setDesc("在文件资源管理器中隐藏文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Folder notes don't open when clicking on the name of the folder (on mobile)")
regex.target: .setDesc("在手机上点击文件夹名称时文件夹笔记不会打开")

regex.source: .setDesc("Only open folder notes in the file explorer by clicking on the folder name")
regex.target: .setDesc("仅通过点击文件夹名称在文件资源管理器中打开文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Disable the ability to collapse folders by clicking exactly on the folder name")
regex.target: .setDesc("禁用通过准确点击文件夹名称来折叠文件夹的功能")
.setDesc("为文件/文件夹命令使用子菜单")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically rename a folder name in the file explorer when the folder note is renamed")
regex.target: .setDesc("当文件夹笔记重命名时，自动重命名文件资源管理器中的文件夹名称")

regex.source: .setDesc("Hide the collapse icon in the file explorer next to the name of a folder when a folder only contains a folder note")
regex.target: .setDesc("当文件夹仅包含文件夹笔记时，在文件资源管理器中隐藏文件夹名称旁的折叠图标")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add an underline to folders that have a folder note in the file explorer")
regex.target: .setDesc("为在文件资源管理器中有文件夹笔记的文件夹添加下划线")

regex.source: .setDesc("Make the folder name bold in the file explorer")
regex.target: .setDesc("在文件资源管理器中使文件夹名称加粗")

regex.source: .setDesc("Make the folder name cursive in the file explorer")
regex.target: .setDesc("在文件资源管理器中使文件夹名称斜体")

regex.source: .setDesc("Open a folder note when clicking on a folder name in the path if it is a folder note")
regex.target: .setDesc("在路径中点击文件夹名称时，如果它是文件夹笔记，则打开文件夹笔记")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically rename a folder name in the path above a note when the folder note is renamed")
regex.target: .setDesc("当文件夹笔记重命名时，自动重命名笔记上方路径中的文件夹名称")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add an underline to folders that have a folder note in the path above a note")
regex.target: .setDesc("为在笔记上方路径中有文件夹笔记的文件夹添加下划线")

regex.source: .setDesc("Make the folder name bold in the path above a note")
regex.target: .setDesc("在笔记上方路径中使文件夹名称加粗")

regex.source: .setDesc("Make the folder name cursive in the path above a note")
regex.target: .setDesc("在笔记上方路径中使文件夹名称斜体")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if the title should be shown")
.setDesc("Choose the title of the folder overview")
.setDesc("Choose the folder path for the overview")
.setDesc("Choose the style of the overview (grid style soon)")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择概览的样式（网格样式即将推出）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if the collapsed condition should be stored stored until you restart Obsidian")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择折叠条件是否应存储直到您重启 Obsidian")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if the file tag should be shown after the file name")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择文件名后是否显示文件标签")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if folder notes (the note itself and not the folder name) should be shown in the overview")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择文件夹笔记（笔记本身而不是文件夹名称）是否应显示在概览中")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose how the files should be sorted")
.setDesc("Show the names of folders that appear to have no files/folders in the folder overview. That's mostly the case when you set the file depth to 1.")
regex.target: .setDesc("显示在文件夹概览中似乎没有文件/文件夹的文件夹名称。这通常发生在您将文件深度设置为 1 时。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Remove the collapse icon next to the folder name for folder notes when they only contain the folder note itself")
regex.target: .setDesc("当文件夹仅包含文件夹笔记本身时，移除文件夹名称旁的折叠图标")

regex.source: .setDesc("Manage the default settings for the folder overview plugin")
regex.target: .setDesc("管理文件夹概览插件的默认设置")

regex.source: .appendText("The regexes and wildcards are only for the folder name, not the path.")
regex.target: .appendText("正则表达式和通配符仅适用于文件夹名称，而不是路径。")

regex.source: .appendText("If you want to switch to a folder path delete the pattern first.")
regex.target: .appendText("如果您想切换到文件夹路径，请先删除模式。")

regex.source: .setTitle(`Turn into folder note for ${folder == null ? void 0 : folder.name}`)
regex.target: .setTitle(`转换为文件夹笔记 ${folder == null ? void 0 : folder.name}`)
.setTitle("从排除的文件夹中移除文件夹")
.setTitle("将文件夹排除在文件夹笔记之外")
.addOption("obsidianTrash", "移动到 Obsidian 垃圾桶 (.trash 文件夹)")

regex.source: .append("Choose the file types that should be supported for folder notes. (e.g. if you click on a folder name it searches for all file extensions that are supported)", desc0.createEl("br"), "Adding more file types may cause performance issues becareful when adding more file types and don't add too many.")
regex.target: .append("选择应支持的文件夹笔记文件类型。 (例如，如果您点击文件夹名称，它将搜索所有支持的文件扩展名)", desc0.createEl("br"), "添加更多文件类型可能会导致性能问题，添加时要小心，不要添加太多。")

regex.source: .append("Add {regex} at the beginning of the folder name to use a regex pattern.", desc3.createEl("br"), "Use * before and after to exclude folders that include the name between the *s.", desc3.createEl("br"), "Use * before the folder name to exclude folders that end with the folder name.", desc3.createEl("br"), "Use * after the folder name to exclude folders that start with the folder name.")
regex.target: .append("在文件夹名称开头添加 {regex} 以使用正则表达式模式。", desc3.createEl("br"), "在前后使用 * 来排除包含 *s 之间名称的文件夹。", desc3.createEl("br"), "在文件夹名称前使用 * 来排除以文件夹名称结尾的文件夹。", desc3.createEl("br"), "在文件夹名称后使用 * 来排除以文件夹名称开头的文件夹。")
